race.comment: TAPINFORPAR (6) has been savaging the line throughout this prep without winning. Steps back out to a pet trip this time and gets in light with the claim. Watch for him launching off their backs. SYNCHRO (1) put it all together fourth-up when driving hard at the end to score by a long neck here. Races his best over this track and trip. Must take seriously. NICISH (5) will likely land in a sticky spot from the inside alley but if the gaps appear she can burst through and grab them. ANNIHILATE (9) is mixing his form but caught the eye last start at Murray Bridge and has peaks that measure up. WILLYBEAFACTOR (3) has been freshened after some disappointing efforts but loves the wet and can give this a big shake if back somewhere near his best.
